title: QuietFrame
description: Adaptive Fabric performance tuning for smoother Minecraft gameplay.
body:
QuietFrame is a client-side Fabric mod that adaptively tunes Minecraft performance settings to keep gameplay smoother and more stable.

It monitors performance conditions during play and switches between internal profiles when needed instead of relying on one fixed preset.

- Adaptive performance profiles
- Runtime tuning based on FPS and frame time
- Client-side only
- Works with modern Fabric performance setups

Tested with Minecraft 26.1.2, Fabric Loader 0.19.2, Fabric API, and Java 25.
